state_snapshot.overall_goal: Integrate openNURBS 8.x into Alice Viewer 2 for DOD-optimized .3dm mesh translation and stabilize the CI/CD infrastructure for cross-platform reliability.
state_snapshot.active_constraints: - **Build/Tooling**: LLVM clang-cl, Ninja, C++17, Static Runtime (/MT). No MSVC `cl.exe`. - **VCPKG Resolution**: Overlay ports MUST be resolved via `VCPKG_OVERLAY_PORTS` in `CMakeLists.txt` targeting the specific `ports/` subdirectory. - **CI/CD Enforcements**: Windows runners must install Ninja via Chocolatey (`choco install ninja`); Ubuntu runners must install `ninja-build clang lld`. - **Coding Mandates**: STRICT Allman style; Data-Oriented Design (DOD); Branchless logic; Zero heap allocations in hot loops; Restrict STL (use `std::array` or raw arrays; no `std::vector` resizing in main loop). - **OpenGL**: Version 400 Core. Use `GL_RGBA16F` for G-Buffers. No `::` prefix for GL functions. Include `glad/glad.h` and `GLFW/glfw3.h` BEFORE `AliceViewer.h`. - **Aesthetics**: Background `0.9`. Deep Charcoal (`#2D2D2D`) geometry. Window Title: `"ALICE CAD ON FRAMEWORK"`.
state_snapshot.key_knowledge: - **vcpkg Baseline**: Manually updated to modern hash `44bc1b84225ea1fbb700b9f6c0fc5984fd87e898` (confirmed local vcpkg commit) in `vcpkg.json` and `vcpkg-configuration.json` to fix CI/CD versioning issues. - **openNURBS Version**: `8.24.25281.15003` (via overlay and version override). - **Overlay Subpath**: `VCPKG_OVERLAY_PORTS` must point to the directory containing the port folders (e.g., `${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/vcpkg-overlay-ports/ports`). - **Linker Requirements**: Static linkage of openNURBS on Windows requires `shlwapi.lib` and `zlib.lib`. - **Two-Pass Extraction**: Implemented in `RhinoIO.h` for DOD/Zero-heap efficiency.
state_snapshot.artifact_trail: - `vcpkg.json`: Added `builtin-baseline` field and updated to hash `44bc1b84225ea1fbb700b9f6c0fc5984fd87e898`. - `vcpkg-configuration.json`: Updated baseline hash to `44bc1b84225ea1fbb700b9f6c0fc5984fd87e898`. - `src/sketch.cpp`: Configured for `RHINO_IO_RUN_TEST` with `Alice::RhinoIO_UnitTest()`. - `build/`: Cleanly regenerated with explicit Ninja/LLVM toolchain (clang-cl).
state_snapshot.file_system_state: - CWD: `C:\Users\shajay.b\Documents\REPOS\alice-viewer - openNurbs` - COMPILER: `C:/Program Files/LLVM/bin/clang-cl.exe` (Clang 22.1.2) - VCPKG BASELINE: `44bc1b84225ea1fbb700b9f6c0fc5984fd87e898` - BUILD: Cleanly regenerated in `./build/`.
state_snapshot.recent_actions: - Finalized local build verification (0 errors). - Executed SOP Step 8: Configured `src/sketch.cpp`, wiped `build/`, and regenerated with explicit toolchain flags. - Synchronized vcpkg baseline across all configuration files.
state_snapshot.task_state: 1. [DONE] Setup vcpkg overlay ports for openNURBS 8.x. 2. [DONE] Implement single-header `RhinoIO.h` with `ONX_Model` translation. 3. [DONE] Repair CI/CD pipeline (Baseline override for modern registries). 4. [DONE] Add support for Curve and Point translation. 5. [DONE] Execute SOP steps 7-9 (Clean build and handoff). 6. [IN PROGRESS] Implement GL-ready buffer generation for extracted geometry. 7. [TODO] Add support for adaptive NURBS curve approximation.
